scope: Group 6 — Cloud Adapters, KB Pipeline, Discovery Integration

all_features_implemented.details: FR-005 (Voyage + OpenAI adapters), FR-002 (KB pipeline), FR-016 (discover integration) all implemented

unit_test_coverage_ge_80.details: Overall 88.36% line coverage; new files: voyage-adapter 97.08%, openai-adapter 97.18%, document-chunker 93.9%, pipeline 98.24%, discover-integration 96.65%

code_follows_linting_standards.details: ESM modules, consistent JSDoc, matches existing codebase patterns

implementation_matches_design.details: Adapter interface matches codebert-adapter pattern; pipeline uses existing chunker patterns; discover integration follows specified API

code_documentation_complete.details: All files have REQ/FR/AC traceability headers, JSDoc on public APIs, inline comments on design decisions

backward_compatibility.details: All 303 existing tests continue passing; no breaking changes to engine API
